caption: A woman with dark hair styled in a bun and wearing black headphones sits in a studio setting, facing a large black microphone on a stand. She is wearing a dark green t-shirt featuring a red circular graphic on the chest. Behind her is a backdrop with the text "SS TALK 101" and "It's A Unique Hustle," along with the word "CAST" and the phrase "About It!". To her left and right, framed images of a person are mounted on the wall. A small logo that reads "BOSS TALK 101" is visible on the table and in the corner of the screen. Across the sequence of frames, the woman remains in a seated position, maintaining a slight smile and looking off-camera to her right, with very little movement in her posture or facial expression.
